tagline: Broadcasting only the best Urban AC & R&B Throwback music straight from the heart of the Austin community!

hosts.name: Danny Boy
hosts.bio: Start your mornings with high-energy tracks, local community news, and the smoothest morning R&B vibes.

hosts.name: ChiTown
hosts.bio: Bridging communities and markets with smooth Urban AC cuts, throwback reviews, and live call-ins.

hosts.name: Kimberla
hosts.bio: Bringing you the deepest gospel cuts and community soul highlights straight from Tarpon Springs & Chicago.

hosts.name: Miss Liz
hosts.bio: Highlighting Austin and Chicago local community leaders, grassroots creators, and block party organizers.

hosts.bio: Reserved for upcoming syndications and regional Urban AC DJ partnerships. Stay tuned for rotational schedules!
